# s07 sample interaction

# Build first, then:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... ./s07 -v -mcp "echo=./s07 -server" "reverse 'hermes'"

[echo-mcp] running in MCP server mode on stdio   # (this is from the subprocess)
[mcp] echo connected; 2 tools registered
[registry] 4 tools (gen=4): [bash mcp_echo_echo mcp_echo_reverse read_file]
[turn 0] assistant: I'll reverse it.
[turn 0] -> mcp_echo_reverse map[text:hermes]
[turn 0] <- semreh
[turn 1] assistant: 'hermes' reversed is 'semreh'.
'hermes' reversed is 'semreh'.
